summary: The diff shows code modifications to urlParams.ts and project_state.json, which violates the explicit constraint of not modifying any code or configuration files. REQ-176 specified a deployment retry only, using exact same artifacts without any changes.

missing_requirements.requirement: Retry the previous deployment that failed, using the exact same build configuration and code state from the last attempt
missing_requirements.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly stated 'Do not modify any code or configuration files' and 'Use the exact same build artifacts and deployment parameters as the previous attempt'. However, the diff shows modifications to source files instead of a pure deployment retry.

hallucinated_features.description: Implementation of URL parameter utility functions including getUrlParameter, storeSessionParameter, getSessionParameter, getPersistedUrlParameter, clearSessionParameter, and clearParamFromHash
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly forbids modifying any code or configuration files. The entire urlParams.ts modification appears to be new feature implementation rather than a deployment retry. The constraints clearly state 'Maintain all existing feature implementations without changes' and list as non-goals: 'Adding new features or functionality' and 'Modifying existing code or logic'.

hallucinated_features.description: Updates to project state configuration file
hallucinated_features.reason: The project_state.json file was modified, which directly violates the constraint 'Do not modify any code or configuration files'. A deployment retry should not involve changing configuration files.
